(1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions ofServices of- Chairman, Vice-Chainnan and Members)~Amendment Rules, 2015. 2. In die Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chairman, Vice-Chairmzm and Members) Rules, 1989,11] rule 6, for sub-rule (3), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:— ‘ “(3) On the expiry of his term of oflice in the Tribunal, the Chairman, Vice-Chairman or Member shall be - E entitled to receive cash equivalent to leave salary in respect of the arned Leave and Leave on Half Average Pay standing to his credit: , i ‘ 1 Provided that the quantum of leave encashed under this submit: and proviso to sub~rule (2) 'of rule 5 shall not exceed 300 days: ' \5 Provided further that the cash equivalent payable for Leave on Half Average Pay shall be equal to leave salary _ as admissible for Half Average Pay plus Deamess Allowance admissible at the rates in force on the date of th relinquishment of ofi‘iee in e Tribunal. Commutation of Leave on Half Average Pay shall not be permissible for encashment”.
